text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh…… Trainer, seems like you found me huh.
choice_data_list: Why did you not come to training?
Why did you not come to training?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't seem to find it in me 
y'know. So I stared at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm feeling dissatisfied with 
anything, nothing like that. Though I 
guess… my whims have been getting a 
little impulsive.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense to be told off. 
Sorry I worried you. In fact, 
thanks for coming to find me.

It does seem like she slacked off for no 
particular reason. Any other response may 
have been dumbfounding but regardless, I 
made sure to strictly warn her.
